australian_relation: Territory Stories OCR from an NT newspaper item naming a ghost haunting the Mix 104.9 FM studios and Darwin's Most Haunted.
coordinate_evidence_note: Territory Stories OCR names the Mix 104.9 FM studios and Darwin's Most Haunted; exact studio coordinate did not verify, so the representative flag uses the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Darwin town result.
evidence_summary: The Northern Territory News item reported that announcers would be joined by Darwin's Most Haunted, broadcasting to find the ghosts haunting the building. It added that the ghost haunting the Mix 104.9 FM studios gets to listen to music all day and mentioned the station's headquarters and ghost insurance.
publication_or_organisation: The Northern Territory News; News Corp Australia / Library & Archives NT
title: ghost in Mix 104.9 FM studios ghost
